summary: Agent ran workflow-guard:ts and workflow-brief:ts, exposed a wrong-root failure, and parent reran the same checks with fixture root to verify the executable TED path.

execution_evidence.verification_method: Sub-agent ran workflow-guard:ts before execution and reported the non-zero JSON result.

execution_evidence.actual_observation: Exit 0. Output pass=true, state=ready-for-execution, stale=false, failures=[], must_read only routing-login-TED.md and may_skip PRD/TSD/TVD.
execution_evidence.verification_method: Parent reran guard with the correct fixture root after the sub-agent discovered the wrong-root failure.

residual_risks: The first sub-agent command used the default root and produced a negative guard result.
Positive readiness was verified against fixture documents, not a production feature task with code edits.
